Title: Cadence rule editor and open-slot visualization
Status: Done
Verified: false
Backdated: 2026-04-25
Ticket: CMP-FE-112
Epic: CMP-E1: Campaign Management and Cadence
---

As an admin
I want to configure cadence and see open slots so scheduling gaps are visible.
So teams can claim content against real coverage needs.

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] Campaign form supports cadence presets and simple custom weekday selection.
- [ ] Open slots render in campaign detail and dashboard.
- [ ] Filled slots reflect claimed content; completed slots reflect posted content.
- [ ] Cadence updates affect future slots only.
- [ ] Slot state styling clearly distinguishes open/claimed/posted.
